---
title: "About"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: assets/profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/anayana
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-Mail
      href: mailto:steinchen16@posteo.de
---

I work at the intersection of remote sensing, GIS, and applied programming —
with the goal of better understanding ecological processes and supporting
sustainable decisions through data.

## Experience

**Researcher** · Forest 3D Measurement & Visualization
: Acquisition and visualization of forest structure using 3D methods.

**Researcher** · Multi-Criteria Decision Analysis
: Development of a tool for multi-criteria evaluation in an environmental context.

**Research Assistant** · Biosphere Reserve Monitoring
: Worldwide inventory of biosphere reserves using GIS.

## Education

**M. Sc. Forest Information Technology**
: Thesis at a major environmental research institute; internship in renewable energy research.

**M. Eng. Forestry**
: International program with focus on forest management and policy.

**B. Sc. International Forest Ecosystem Management**
: Exchange semester abroad; field project in the Amazon lowlands of Peru.

## Skills

[R]{.badge-skill}
[Python]{.badge-skill}
[Julia]{.badge-skill}
[SQL]{.badge-skill}
[QGIS / PyQGIS]{.badge-skill}
[ArcGIS]{.badge-skill}
[PostGIS]{.badge-skill}
[SAGA GIS]{.badge-skill}
[Remote Sensing]{.badge-skill}
[LiDAR]{.badge-skill}
[Shiny]{.badge-skill}
[Git]{.badge-skill}
[Quarto]{.badge-skill}

**Languages:** German · English · Spanish · French · Portuguese
